register_system: Du informal vs Sie formal (business default); registers from colloquial to Hochdeutsch. Traps: wrong Sie/case.
translationese_traps: Literal compounds/splits; genitive/passive; verb-final position; ASCII umlaut/ß ignore.
return_to_original_risks: Compound/case recreation fail; ß/umlaut loss; formality drop.
idiom_mapping_notes: Functional ('auf die Nerven gehen'); literal compounds risky.
tutoring_pronunciation_hooks: Umlauts shift vowels (ä~cat); sharp ß; final devoicing.
orthography_notes: Umlauts äöü; ß (ẞ capital); all nouns capitalized.
